appliedUpdates.description: Documented effective concurrency of 1 for the deep-upsert-ingest CLI/pytest flow and added milestone-specific guidance to validate with TestComparisonProof plus supplemental read-only checks when needed.
Recorded the expected PytestUnknownMarkWarning for @pytest.mark.slow in test/test_ingest_v2.py so future validators know the warning is harmless.
